# Assumption Record

## Assumption ID

`ASM-...`

## Status

OPEN / PROPOSED / APPROVED / REJECTED / SUPERSEDED / SOURCE_RESOLVED

## Stage

Project stage or task scope.

## Source IDs

- `SRC-...`

## Claim IDs

- `CLM-...`

## Problem Or Source Gap

Describe what the primary source does not fix.

## Proposed Assumption

Describe the proposed choice.

## Alternatives Considered

List alternatives and why each matters.

## Why This Choice Is Not Neutral

Explain how results could change.

## Validation Or Ablation Plan

Describe tests or sensitivity analysis.

## Human PI Approval

Name, date, and decision reference.
